name: Star Blogger: Left or Right
author: Poki
description: Star Blogger: Left or Right lets you live your dress up dreams! Make infinite glamorous combinations and customize your blogger to your heart's desire, changing any hairstyles, eye color, as well as every single piece of clothing. If you feel daring, you can also go in a head-to-head competition against an opponent in order to prove yourself as the ultimate fashionista! Are you ready to claim the title of Star Blogger? How do I play Star Blogger: Left or Right? Use your mouse to make your choice and assemble your amazing outfit! Who created Star Blogger: Left or Right? Star Blogger: Left or Right is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Anime Dress Up , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Stickman Bike , Stickman Race , Tag , Tag 2 , and wall-jumper! How can I play Star Blogger: Left or Right for free? You can play Star Blogger: Left or Right for free on Poki. Can I play Star Blogger: Left or Right on mobile devices and desktop? Star Blogger: Left or Right can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
